---
title: "Projects"
---

I've worked on a diverse range of projects spanning computer vision, NLP, time series analysis, and data analytics. Here are my selected projects organized by category:

## Computer Vision & Image Processing

::: project-grid

::: project-card
### Wildlife Conservation in Côte d'Ivoire
Developed advanced neural network models to classify animal species from camera trap images, supporting scientists in tracking wildlife populations through an image classification competition.

<span class="project-tag">CNN</span>
<span class="project-tag">Transfer Learning</span>
<span class="project-tag">Image Classification</span>
:::

::: project-card
### Crop Disease Detection in Uganda
Built and trained a convolutional neural network (CNN) to classify crop disease images into five categories; improved model accuracy by leveraging transfer learning with pre-trained models and training optimizations using Callbacks.

<span class="project-tag">CNN</span>
<span class="project-tag">Transfer Learning</span>
<span class="project-tag">Keras</span>
:::

::: project-card
### Traffic Monitoring in Bangladesh
Processed real-time traffic video feeds from Dhaka to detect and label objects such as vehicles and pedestrians; extended pre-trained object detection models to handle custom traffic analysis tasks.

<span class="project-tag">Object Detection</span>
<span class="project-tag">Computer Vision</span>
<span class="project-tag">Video Processing</span>
:::

::: project-card
### Medical Data Generation in Spain
Designed and trained Generative Adversarial Networks (GANs) to synthesize medical images like X-rays and MRIs; deployed an interactive Streamlit web app and managed version control using Git and GitHub.

<span class="project-tag">GANs</span>
<span class="project-tag">Streamlit</span>
<span class="project-tag">Medical Imaging</span>
:::

::: project-card
### Celebrity Sightings in India
Implemented face detection and recognition using MTCNN and Inception-ResNet; built a Flask application to perform face recognition on uploaded images, demonstrated on video footage of boxer Mary Kom.

<span class="project-tag">Face Recognition</span>
<span class="project-tag">MTCNN</span>
<span class="project-tag">Flask</span>
:::

::: project-card
### Underwater Image Enhancement
Developed a Physics-Informed Diffusion-Based Framework for enhancing underwater images in high turbidity conditions, combining deep learning with physical modelling for marine imaging applications.

<span class="project-tag">Diffusion Models</span>
<span class="project-tag">Physics-Informed ML</span>
<span class="project-tag">Computer Vision</span>
:::

:::

## NLP & Generative AI

::: project-grid

::: project-card
### Live Twitter Sentiment Analysis
Developed an interactive Streamlit tool to stream live tweets via Tweepy; implemented NLP sentiment pipelines using TextBlob; produced real-time sentiment dashboards and WordClouds to interpret public opinion trends.

<span class="project-tag">NLP</span>
<span class="project-tag">Tweepy</span>
<span class="project-tag">Streamlit</span>
<span class="project-tag">TextBlob</span>
:::

::: project-card
### Social Media Meme Generator
Applied stable diffusion models to develop a meme generator for social media campaigns; deployed the solution as an interactive Streamlit application.

<span class="project-tag">Stable Diffusion</span>
<span class="project-tag">Generative AI</span>
<span class="project-tag">Streamlit</span>
:::

:::

## Time Series & Finance

::: project-grid

::: project-card
### Air Quality in Nairobi
Built an ARMA time-series model to forecast particulate matter levels in Kenya; extracted data from MongoDB using PyMongo and improved prediction accuracy through hyperparameter tuning.

<span class="project-tag">ARMA</span>
<span class="project-tag">Time Series</span>
<span class="project-tag">MongoDB</span>
:::

::: project-card
### Volatility Forecasting in India
Developed a GARCH time-series model to predict asset volatility; retrieved stock data via an API, stored it in SQLite, and built a custom API to deliver predictions.

<span class="project-tag">GARCH</span>
<span class="project-tag">Time Series</span>
<span class="project-tag">API Development</span>
<span class="project-tag">SQLite</span>
:::

::: project-card
### NBA MVP Predictor
Automated web scraping of player, team, and MVP data from Basketball Reference; cleaned and merged historical stats (1991–2022); built predictive models to forecast MVP selections based on key performance metrics.

<span class="project-tag">Web Scraping</span>
<span class="project-tag">Predictive Modeling</span>
<span class="project-tag">Pandas</span>
:::

:::

## Data Analytics & Visualization

::: project-grid

::: project-card
### Customer Churn Analysis (BCG Forage)
Engineered a random forest model achieving 50% recall for churn prediction; analyzed client data using Python (Pandas, NumPy); created visual dashboards and authored an executive summary with strategic recommendations.

<span class="project-tag">Random Forest</span>
<span class="project-tag">Data Visualization</span>
<span class="project-tag">Pandas</span>
:::

::: project-card
### Retail Data Analytics (Quantium Forage)
Analyzed transaction datasets to generate customer insights and commercial recommendations; identified benchmark stores for uplift testing on new layouts; delivered strategic reports for the Category Manager.

<span class="project-tag">Data Analysis</span>
<span class="project-tag">Business Intelligence</span>
<span class="project-tag">SQL</span>
:::

::: project-card
### Customer Segmentation in the US
Implemented k-means clustering to segment US consumers; visualized high-dimensional data using PCA and developed an interactive dashboard with Plotly Dash.

<span class="project-tag">K-Means</span>
<span class="project-tag">PCA</span>
<span class="project-tag">Plotly Dash</span>
:::

::: project-card
### A/B Testing at WorldQuant University
Conducted chi-square tests to evaluate the impact of marketing emails on enrollment; built custom Python ETL classes and deployed an interactive app using a three-tier architecture.

<span class="project-tag">A/B Testing</span>
<span class="project-tag">Chi-Square</span>
<span class="project-tag">ETL</span>
:::

::: project-card
### Business Data Visualization (TCS Forage)
Designed executive-level data visualizations for Tata Consultancy Services; crafted client-focused questions for senior leadership meetings; translated analytical findings into clear visuals.

<span class="project-tag">Data Visualization</span>
<span class="project-tag">Tableau</span>
<span class="project-tag">Business Intelligence</span>
:::

::: project-card
### Housing in Mexico
Analyzed a dataset of 21,000 properties to study the influence of property size and location on real estate prices; performed data cleaning, created visualizations, and examined variable correlations.

<span class="project-tag">EDA</span>
<span class="project-tag">Data Cleaning</span>
<span class="project-tag">Visualization</span>
:::

::: project-card
### Apartment Sales in Buenos Aires
Developed a linear regression model to predict apartment prices in Argentina; built a data pipeline for imputation and encoding, and enhanced model performance by addressing overfitting.

<span class="project-tag">Linear Regression</span>
<span class="project-tag">Data Pipeline</span>
<span class="project-tag">Scikit-learn</span>
:::

::: project-card
### Zomato Restaurant Data Analysis
Processed raw restaurant data with Python and Excel; performed SQL-based analysis to identify top-rated venues, compare online vs offline ordering trends, and generate strategic insights for Zomato's growth.

<span class="project-tag">SQL</span>
<span class="project-tag">Data Analysis</span>
<span class="project-tag">Python</span>
:::

:::

## Database & Engineering

::: project-grid

::: project-card
### Image Similarity Search Engine
Built an end-to-end image similarity pipeline with Python, Milvus, and MySQL; extracted features, indexed vectors, and linked Milvus IDs to filenames to deliver fast vector-based search for similar images.

<span class="project-tag">Milvus</span>
<span class="project-tag">MySQL</span>
<span class="project-tag">Vector Search</span>
<span class="project-tag">Python</span>
:::

::: project-card
### Little Lemon Restaurant Database (Meta Capstone)
Designed and implemented a normalized relational database with MySQL; developed stored procedures for booking management; integrated Python and Tableau to automate queries and visualize reservation trends.

<span class="project-tag">MySQL</span>
<span class="project-tag">Database Design</span>
<span class="project-tag">Tableau</span>
<span class="project-tag">Stored Procedures</span>
:::

::: project-card
### Banking Trends Analysis
Engineered robust data pipelines in Python to clean banking transaction data; authored advanced SQL queries to examine deposits, regional spending, and customer activity; derived actionable insights.

<span class="project-tag">SQL</span>
<span class="project-tag">Data Pipeline</span>
<span class="project-tag">Python</span>
:::

::: project-card
### Work-Related Fatality Analysis
Engineered Python scripts to clean and transform incident data; automated dataset export to MySQL; authored complex SQL queries to examine fatality trends, state-wise incidents, and high-risk activities.

<span class="project-tag">Python</span>
<span class="project-tag">MySQL</span>
<span class="project-tag">Data Engineering</span>
:::

:::

## Classification & Risk Assessment

::: project-grid

::: project-card
### Bankruptcy in Poland
Designed random forest and gradient boosting models to predict company bankruptcy; handled imbalanced datasets through resampling, leveraged Linux command line tools, and balanced precision-recall tradeoffs.

<span class="project-tag">Random Forest</span>
<span class="project-tag">Gradient Boosting</span>
<span class="project-tag">Imbalanced Data</span>
<span class="project-tag">Linux</span>
:::

::: project-card
### Earthquake Damage in Nepal
Created logistic regression and decision tree models to assess building damage risks from earthquakes; managed data extraction from SQLite and investigated biases that could cause model discrimination.

<span class="project-tag">Logistic Regression</span>
<span class="project-tag">Decision Trees</span>
<span class="project-tag">SQLite</span>
<span class="project-tag">Bias Analysis</span>
:::

:::
